evals.prompt: I need name constraints for leaf.example.com against constrained-ca.pem.
evals.expected_output: Use the name-constraints-checker skill for this name constraints checker request and produce the documented result for leaf.example.com against constrained-ca.pem.
expectations: Selects name-constraints-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_name_constraints.
Keeps the response focused on checking CA certificate Name Constraints and verifying leaf certificate names comply with parent CA constraints.

evals.prompt: Verify leaf.example.com against constrained-ca.pem and report any name constraints violations.
evals.expected_output: Use the name-constraints-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects name-constraints-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
